Rules.InvariantScript:
Set(
    CurrentIntakeItem,
    Blank()
);
Set(
    CurrentTrackerItem,
    Blank()
);
Set(
    CurrentReviewItem,
    Blank()
);
Set(
    varImageHight,
    200
);
If(
    Not(IsBlankOrError(Param("entity"))),
    Switch(
        Param("entity"),
        "tracker",
        Set(
            CurrentTrackerItem,
            LookUp(
                'UK Customs SharePoint Custom Tracker List',
                ID = Int(Param("id"))
            )
        ),
        "intake",
        Set(
            CurrentIntakeItem,
            LookUp(
                'UK Customs SharePoint Intake Form',
                ID = Int(Param("id"))
            )
        ),
        "order",
        Set(
            CurrentOrderItem,
            LookUp(
                'UK Customs SharePoint Order Confirmation List',
                ID=Int(Param("id"))
            )
        )

    )
);
// Set up tracker status collection
ClearCollect(
    colTrackerStatus,
    {
        field: "Planning Can Continue",
        casestage: " Planning / Concept ",
        caseintake: " Complete ",
        planning: " Planning / Concept ",
        designconcept: " Design Proposal ",
        approval: " Financial Approval ",
        delivery: " Manufacturing",
        surgery: " Surgery "
    },
    {
        field: "Submit Design Proposal for Review",
        casestage: " Planning / Concept ",
        caseintake: " Complete ",
        planning: " Planning / Concept ",
        designconcept: " Design Proposal ",
        approval: " Financial Approval ",
        delivery: " Manufacturing",
        surgery: " Surgery "
    },
    {
        field: "If Applicable. Surgeon Approved Concept",
        casestage: " Planning / Concept ",
        caseintake: " Complete ",
        planning: " Planning / Concept ",
        designconcept: " Design Proposal ",
        approval: " Financial Approval ",
        delivery: " Manufacturing",
        surgery: " Surgery "
    },
    {
        field: "If Applicable. Surgeon Rejected Concept",
        casestage: " Planning / Concept ",
        caseintake: " Complete ",
        planning: " Planning / Concept ",
        designconcept: " Design Proposal ",
        approval: " Financial Approval ",
        delivery: " Manufacturing",
        surgery: " Surgery "
    },
    {
        field: "Sign Prescription Form",
        casestage: " Planning / Concept ",
        caseintake: " Complete ",
        planning: " Planning / Concept ",
        designconcept: " Design Proposal ",
        approval: " Financial Approval ",
        delivery: " Manufacturing",
        surgery: " Surgery "
    },
    {
        field: "Trigger Manufacturing",
        casestage: " Planning / Concept ",
        caseintake: " Complete ",
        planning: " Planning / Concept ",
        designconcept: " Design Proposal ",
        approval: " Financial Approval ",
        delivery: " Manufacturing",
        surgery: " Surgery "
    },
    {
        field: "Confirm OC",
        casestage: " Planning / Concept ",
        caseintake: " Complete ",
        planning: " Planning / Concept ",
        designconcept: " Design Proposal ",
        approval: " Financial Approval ",
        delivery: " Manufacturing",
        surgery: " Surgery "
    },
    {
        field: "Delivered",
        casestage: " Planning / Concept ",
        caseintake: " Complete ",
        planning: " Planning / Concept ",
        designconcept: " Design Proposal ",
        approval: " Financial Approval ",
        delivery: " Manufacturing",
        surgery: " Surgery "
    },
    {
        field: "Case Feedback",
        casestage: " Planning / Concept ",
        caseintake: " Complete ",
        planning: " Planning / Concept ",
        designconcept: " Design Proposal ",
        approval: " Financial Approval ",
        delivery: " Manufacturing",
        surgery: " Surgery "
    }
)
;
Set(varRowHeight,50);
//Responsible block properties
Set(varRespWidth,222);

If(
    IsBlankOrError(Param("entity")),
    HomeScreen,
    Switch(
        Param("entity"),
        "tracker",
        CustomTrackerScreen,
        "intake",
        IntakeFormScreen,
        "review",
        IntakeReviewScreen,
        "order",
        CustomOrderScren
    )
)
